title: nock cheatsheet
description: Schema for a nock cheatsheet file. Authoritative Go definition lives in pkg/format/format.go; keep them in sync.

schema_version.description: Cheatsheet schema version. Omit to accept the current version.

source.description: Provenance, e.g. the URL a sheet was imported from.

id.description: Stable unique identifier within the cheatsheet.

command.description: Command template. Variables are written as <name>, e.g. 'nmap -sV <target>'.

intent.description: Natural-language goal of the command. Primary signal for AI ranking.

risk.description: How destructive or detectable the command is.

requires_auth.description: Whether the command needs valid credentials to be useful.
